Royal Quest
Angel Feather Book

Once in a while, curses 3 random enemies for 4 sec. During this time, cursed units take 30% more damage and can't gain shields or effects that reduce or absorb damage. When the curse wears off, cursed enemies take 175000 (+579 of the spell power) pure damage. The book owner restores health to themself and an ally with the lowest health equal to 50% of the damage dealt.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
